# Test artifacts command validation
# The artifacts command lists all artifacts in a notebook
# Requires: <notebook-id>

# === ARTIFACTS COMMAND ===
# Test artifacts without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test artifacts
stderr 'usage: nlm artifacts <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test artifacts with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test artifacts notebook123 extra
stderr 'usage: nlm artifacts <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test artifacts without authentication (should fail)
! exec ./nlm_test artifacts notebook123
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'
